mapper.select: SELECT * FROM skill WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY category, id
SELECT * FROM skill WHERE category = #{category} AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY id
SELECT * FROM skill WHERE is_built_in = 1 AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY category, id
SELECT s.* FROM skill s INNER JOIN user_skill us ON s.id = us.skill_id WHERE us.user_id = #{userId} AND us.is_installed = 1 AND s.is_active = 1 ORDER BY s.category, s.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO skill (name, description, icon, category, prompt, tools, is_built_in, is_active, created_at, updated_at, markdown_content, script_path, script_content, version, author) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{icon}, #{category}, #{prompt}, #{tools}, #{isBuiltIn}, #{isActive}, NOW(), NOW(), #{markdownContent}, #{scriptPath}, #{scriptContent}, #{version}, #{author})
mapper.update: UPDATE skill SET name=#{name}, description=#{description}, icon=#{icon}, category=#{category}, prompt=#{prompt}, tools=#{tools}, is_active=#{isActive}, markdown_content=#{markdownContent}, script_path=#{scriptPath}, script_content=#{scriptContent}, version=#{version}, author=#{author}, updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id}
